title: gahnia aristata
intro: Gahnia aristata, also known as Kāka-tō, is a native Australian plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gahnia aristata include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. Gahnia aristata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
